---
title: "Rāg Ālāhiyā"
subtitle: "*ḍapha bājata mohana*"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
---

::: {.composer-info}
**Composer:** Adāraṅga &nbsp;·&nbsp; **Tāl:** Dhamār (Madhyalay)
:::

## Lyrics {.unnumbered}

::: {.lyrics-block}

**Sthāyī**

> ḍapha bājata mohana chabi chājata  
> nācata gata so ānanda de de de de tāri

**Antarā**

> tāla mṛdaṅga upāṅga bīṇa dhuna  
> nevara kī jhanakāra kārī 

**Sanchārī**

> gvāla bāla saba saṅga sakhā ṭhāḍhe  
> bane sāgara nāgara banacārī

**Ābhog**

> dekhi adāraṅga bhūla pyārī ko  
> aṅga samāna tāri

:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal" collapse="true"}
## Reading the notation

Dhamār (Madhyalay) is a 14-beat cycle, visually divided here as **3 + 2 + 2 + 3 + 4** (vibhāgs marked **X**, **2**, **O**, **3**). Each row below shows **one complete cycle**: the fourteen columns correspond to beats 1–14. Sam **X** is at beat 1, followed by an unmarked sub-division at beat 4, then **2** at beat 6, **O** (khālī) at beat 8, and **3** at beat 11. 

The sargam row gives the notes; the bold text row below it gives the lyrics syllables. A dash **-** indicates a held note or empty beat. Brackets $\lb{\cdot}$ denote meend (glide) or grouped notes; superscripts $\sps{\cdot}$ indicate the starting grace note of a glide; $\tr{X}$ denotes a note in the upper octave (tār saptak); $\mn{X}$ denotes a note in the lower octave (mandra saptak).
:::

## Sthāyī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .dhamar-madhyalay}

| **X** |   |   |   |   | **2** |   | **O** |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | - | D | N |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ḍa** | **pha** |
| $\tr{S}$ | - | - | $\tr{S}$ | N | $\lb{\tr{R}\tr{S}}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | D | P | D | - | P | m |
| **bā** | **-** | **-** | **ja** | **-** | **ta** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **mo** | **ha** | **-** | **na** | **-** |
| P | m | - | $\lb{Gm}$ | $\lb{Gm}$ | R | - | G | G | - | $\lb{Gm}$ | R | G | - |
| **cha** | **bi** | **-** | **chā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ja** | **ta** | **-** | **nā** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| m | P | - | m | - | $\lb{Gm}$ | $\lb{Gm}$ | R | - | - | G | - | R | - |
| **ca** | **ta** | **-** | **ga** | **-** | **ta** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **so** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| $\lb{SS}$ | - | - | S | S | G | m | P | P | - | D | - | N | - |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **āna** | **nda** | **de** | **-** | **-** | **de** | **-** | **de** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| $\lb{DN}$ | $\tr{R}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\lb{N\tr{S}}$ | $\lb{N\tr{S}}$ | D | N | - | - | P | - | - |
| **de** | **-** | **-** | **tā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ri** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Antarā {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .dhamar-madhyalay}

| **X** |   |   |   |   | **2** |   | **O** |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| - | - | - | P | $\lb{ND}$ | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | - | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **tā** | **-** | **la** | **mṛ** | **da** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ṅga** | **u** |
| $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | - | $\tr{R}$ | $\lb{\tr{G}\tr{R}}$ | $\tr{G}$ | - | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | N | $\lb{\sps{\tr{R}}\tr{S}}$ | $\tr{S}$ |
| **pā** | **-** | **-** | **ṅga** | **-** | **bī** | **-** | **ṇa** | **-** | **-** | **dhu** | **-** | **na** | **-** |
| $\tr{S}$ | D | P | P | D | m | $\lb{Pm}$ | P | - | - | P | - | D | N |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **ne** | **va** | **-** | **-** | **ra** | **-** | **-** | **kī** | **-** | **jha** | **na** |
| $\lb{\sps{D}N}$ | - | $\lb{-\tr{R}}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\lb{N\tr{S}}$ | $\lb{N\tr{S}}$ | D | N | - | - | P | - | - |
| **kā** | **-** | **-** | **ra** | **-** | **kā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **rī** | **-** | **-** |

:::

## Sanchārī {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .dhamar-madhyalay}

| **X** |   |   |   |   | **2** |   | **O** |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| S | - | - | S | - | G | m | P | P | - | D | m | P | - |
| **gvā** | **-** | **-** | **la** | **-** | **bā** | **-** | **-** | **la** | **-** | **sa** | **-** | **ba** | **-** |
| - | - | - | P | - | D | N | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | D | D | - | P | - |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **sa** | **-** | **ṅga** | **sa** | **khā** | **-** | **-** | **ṭhā** | **-** | **ḍhe** | **-** |
| m | G | - | G | G | G | - | G | G | - | $\lb{Gm}$ | R | G | - |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **ba** | **ne** | **sā** | **-** | **ga** | **ra** | **-** | **nā** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| m | P | - | m | - | $\lb{Gm}$ | $\lb{Gm}$ | R | - | - | G | - | R | - |
| **ga** | **ra** | **-** | **ba** | **-** | **na** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **cā** | **-** | **rī** | **-** |

:::

## Ābhog {.unnumbered}

::: {.notation-table .dhamar-madhyalay}

| **X** |   |   |   |   | **2** |   | **O** |   |   | **3** |   |   |   |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| S | - | - | $\lb{\sps{S}\tr{S}}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\lb{N\tr{S}}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | - |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **de** | **-** | **khi** | **ā** | **dā** | **-** | **-** | **ra** | **-** | **ṅga** | **-** |
| - | - | - | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{R}$ | $\tr{R}$ | - | $\tr{G}$ | $\tr{R}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | - |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **bhū** | **-** | **la** | **-** | **pyā** | **-** | **-** | **rī** | **-** | **ko** | **-** |
| $\lb{N\tr{S}}$ | $\lb{N\tr{S}}$ | P | $\lb{\sps{P}\tr{S}}$ | - | $\tr{S}$ | $\tr{S}$ | N | P | - | D | - | N | - |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **a** | **-** | **ṅga** | **sa** | **mā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** |
| $\lb{\sps{D}N}$ | - | $\lb{-\tr{R}}$ | $\tr{S}$ | - | $\lb{N\tr{S}}$ | $\lb{N\tr{S}}$ | D | N | - | P | - | - | - |
| **-** | **-** | **-** | **na** | **-** | **tā** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **-** | **ri** | **-** | **-** | **-** |

:::
